title: Vitaline Order Dashboard data contract
description: Shape of dashboard-data.json consumed by the Vitaline Order Dashboard. Produced by export_dashboard_data.py from the PAR workbook. Any backend that serves data to the dashboard must conform to this schema.

generated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this data was produced. Optional but recommended; the dashboard shows it as a 'Data refreshed' stamp.

controls.description: Header context shown at the top of the dashboard. All strings; formatting is display-ready.

activation.description: Per-office on/off switch. Key = office name (must match the office values in rows). Value = 'Y' (active) or 'N' (inactive). Inactive offices are shown greyed and excluded from all network totals. An office missing from this map is treated as active.

rows.description: One entry per PAR line item where 'Include in PAR' = Y. Each entry is a fixed-order array (not an object) for compactness. The index meaning is below and MUST match the dashboard's COLS map.

prefixItems.title: 0 office
prefixItems.description: Office name. Must match a key in activation.

prefixItems.title: 1 vendor
prefixItems.description: Vendor name, e.g. Infusive / Medline / TwinMed.

prefixItems.title: 3 unitBasis
prefixItems.description: PAR unit basis, e.g. Vial / Box/Case / Each. Display only.

prefixItems.title: 6 onHand
prefixItems.description: Latest in-stock quantity, in the item's PAR unit.

prefixItems.title: 9 orderPacks
prefixItems.description: Suggested order quantity in packs. 0 unless status is ORDER or Below Target.

prefixItems.title: 11 orderCost
prefixItems.description: Suggested order cost (USD). Drives the office's order $ total. 0 unless ordering.

prefixItems.title: 12 status
prefixItems.description: Item status. Drives tiering and visibility.

$comment: STATUS SEMANTICS used by the dashboard: 'ORDER' and 'Below Target' are the two 'needs ordering' states — they contribute to an office's order $ and item count. 'OK' is on-track (counts toward tracked total, no order). 'No Demand' and 'Excluded' are tracked-but-irrelevant. 'Stock View' is a display-only row (e.g. the Biotin 30mL secondary line) — never ordered. 'Inactive' appears when an office is toggled off. TIERING: an active office is Critical if >50% of its tracked items need ordering, Watch if 25-50%, Stable if <25%. Tracked = ORDER + Below Target + OK.
